languages.text: "Ваша Светлость, я отправлю приглашение незамедлительно. Уверен, материальные траты окупятся улучшением отношений с {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Адептус Механикус{/g}".

traits.locale_text: "Ваша Светлость, я отправлю приглашение незамедлительно. Уверен, материальные траты окупятся улучшением отношений с {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Адептус Механикус{/g}".

languages.text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will send the invitation immediately. I'm sure the incurred expenditure will be offset by improved relations with the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}."

languages.text: 「もちろん、御{mf|殿|殿}様。招待状はすぐに送ります。{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}機械神殿{/g}との今後の取引で、この出費は回収されるでしょう」
languages.original_text: "Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will send the invitation immediately. I'm sure the incurred expenditure will be recouped in future dealings with the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}."

traits.locale_text: 「もちろん、御{mf|殿|殿}様。招待状はすぐに送ります。機械神殿との今後の取引で、この出費は回収されるでしょう。」

languages.text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}. Enviaré la invitación de inmediato. No me cabe duda de que los costes resultantes se compensarán con la mejora de nuestras relaciones con el {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will send the invitation immediately. I'm sure the incurred expenditure will be offset by improved relations with the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}."

languages.text: “大人。我将即刻发出邀请。我相信与{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}机械修会{/g}的关系得到改善后，这笔支出定会得到回报。”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will send the invitation immediately. I'm sure the incurred expenditure will be offset by improved relations with the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}."

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich werde die Einladung umgehend versenden. Ich bin sicher, die angefallenen Kosten werden durch die verbesserten Beziehungen mit dem {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} kompensiert."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will send the invitation immediately. I'm sure the incurred expenditure will be offset by improved relations with the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}."

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich werde die Einladung umgehend versenden. Ich bin sicher, die angefallenen Kosten werden durch die verbesserten Beziehungen mit dem {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} kompensiert."

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Davetiyeyi hemen göndereceğim. Masrafların, {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} ile gelişen ilişkilerle telafi edileceğinden eminim."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will send the invitation immediately. I'm sure the incurred expenditure will be offset by improved relations with the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}."

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Davetiyeyi hemen göndereceğim. Masrafların, {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} ile gelişen ilişkilerle telafi edileceğinden eminim."

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie. Je vais immédiatement lui faire parvenir votre invitation. Nous récupérerons certainement les dépenses engagées grâce à nos relations améliorées avec l'{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will send the invitation immediately. I'm sure the incurred expenditure will be offset by improved relations with the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}."
